content_en:
I told him: “Your Royal Highness, are you saying this believing in fully?”

He replied that he believed in it wholeheartedly, just as he believed in the day after the sun rose up in the heavens. Even from before this his heart had been uprooted from his old faith. I replied:

“Your Majesty, if this is so, then I would like to become a Muslim without any delay.”

King Najashi very happily put out his palm and ‘Amr bin Al-‘As pledge allegiance to Islam.

“Then I left for Al-Madinah, so I could meet the Prophet 3 himself and swear allegiance on his palm personally, and enter the fold of Islam. This incident occurred about six months before the conquest of Makkah. On the way I met Khalid bin Waleed and ‘Uthman bin Talhah. Then all of us reached AlMadinah together and tethered our camels outside the Mosque of the Prophet 3%. We bathed, changed clothes, since the Adhan'! for the ‘Asr prayers had already been over. After prayer we entered the presence of the Prophet 3%. Thus our lives and fortunes changed and we entered the fold of Islam.”

“Amr from your intelligence, wisdom, foresight and understanding, it strikes me that you should have been the first to accept Islam.”

Answering him, [ said:

“O ‘Umar! Men’s hearts are in the control of that being who has created us. This kind of obedience and honour are given when He desires it; a mortal has no part in this. Now that this honour has come to me I feel it is due to my good fortune. And I consider that time when I entered the presence of the Prophet 3% and he received me with smiling face, to be the fund and capital of my whole life. When I wished him with the Islamic greeting of ‘Asslamo ‘Alikum’, he replied with smiling gently. I was ashamed and embarrassed, my eyes were cast down. He took me under the protection of his benevolence, and I read the Kalimah - ‘None has the right to be worshipped but Allah and Muhammad is His Prophet and Messenger.’ Immediately after reading it, | asked him to offer supplications to Allah 38 for me, so that my previous sins are forgiven. He answered me:

“When you accept Islam all your previous sins are forgiven, and in the same way Hijrah (migration) also erases all previous sins.”

' The call to prayers, given five times a day for the five compulsory prayers,

1 had accepted Islam with a firm faith and a very strong determination, which was accepted by the Prophet #8. That was the reason why I was appointed Commander of the Muslim army for the Battle of As-Salasal just a few days later. Among the Mujahideen were such notable Companions as Abu Bakr Siddiq, ‘Umar bin Khattéb and ‘Ubaidah bin Al-Jarrah we) rs. After that I command the forces of the Muslim army in many dangerous encounters.”

After gaining complete control of Makkah, the Prophet 38 decided to raze down to the earth the various temples where idols were worshipped in and around the Ka’bah. This was to completely uproot the centres where others were being equated with the One True Allah Almighty. He made a public announcement that all those who had idols in their houses should break them with their own hands. All the idols in the Ka‘bah were shattered into pieces, and the Sacred House of Allah was cleansed of all impurity and filth. All the temples in the environs of Makkah were destroyed and razed to the ground by Companions who were chosen for this task by the Prophet 38.

Khalid bin Waleed was sent to destroy an idol called ‘Uzza, Sa’d bin Zaid Ashhali < was sent to demolish an idol called Manat. And

‘Amr bin Al-‘As 4 was to destroy an idol by the name of Sawa’. This idol had been installed at a place about hundred miles from Makkah. It had been made in the name of Sawa’, the son of Sheeth bin Adam 42) and it was being worshipped from the time of Nah pW. The tribe of Hatheel was its trustees. When ‘Amr bin Al-’As reached there, he found an attendant at the shrine. He asked him for the purpose of his visit. He answered he had come there to destroy the idol, and uproot this evil practice of associating others with the One

“He is so weak that he cannot even defend himself? Surely it is a weakness in our minds, this cannot possibly be our god. He cannot help us when we are in trouble; surely we are mistaken. You are right. I, today accept Islam with all the sincerity of my heart. I herewith cleanse myself from the filth and impurity of associating others with the One True Allah and prostrate before the One True Allah, with Whom none can be associated. Today reality has been revealed to me, I wish I had not spent my whole life in the swamp of idol worship.”

“Amr bin Al-As 4 had broken the idol Sawa’ into fragments without any hindrance.

On the south east of the peninsula of Arabia lies the state of ‘Oman, today it is known as Muscat or ‘Oman, The people of this land associated others with the One True Allah and the Prophet sent ‘Amr bin AL’As . to invite them to the true religion of Islam. Two brothers, ‘Abd and Jeefer ruled over this country, and they also did not worship One True Allah, associating others with him. The Prophet 3 also wrote letter to them to convince them to convert to Islam.

In the Name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful This letter is from Muhammad bin ‘Abdullah to ‘Abd and Jeefer. He

has taken the task of preaching, of following and obeying so that he may gain peace and concord. Accept Islam and you will live in peace and safety.

I have been sent as a Messenger for all the worlds, so that I may warn people of the torments and tortures of Allah 3% (for disbelievers) and adduce arguments to convince the Kuffar. If both you brothers accept Islam, you will continue to rule over your fand. If you refuse your right to govern will be lost and your end will be a lesson for others.

‘Amr bin Al-’As dé took this letter and left for Yemen (‘Oman) alone. Divine providence had bestowed him with wisdom and intelligence. So when he reached ‘Oman he did not display any haste, but took every step after a great deal of thought, consideration and planning. As he was gifted with political insight, he first studied the character and habits of the two brothers. He reached the conclusion that the younger brother ‘Abd was soft hearted; so he decided to meet him first. He realised he had hit the target when ‘Abd was deeply impressed and influenced by his speech. ‘Amr bin Al-’As 4 told him,

“By accepting Islam you will gain both worlds. If you pledge allegiance to Islam you can continue to rule over your country, Our mission is not to grab your power and rule; we wish to make you obey the orders of Allah Almighty. You can rest assured that if you accept Islam you will continue to rule. Thus you will be successful both in this world and in the Hereafter.”

“What you say appeals to me. I wish my brother too would realise this. He is very stubborn and in the matter of the power to rule, he is extremely greedy. When did you become a Muslim? We have seen you fighting against the Muslims.”

‘Amr bin Al-’As 2% said:

“Allah has been Gracious to me. If He pleases to give Guidance He makes manifest and clear the heart to the radiance of Islam. Allah Almighty has given me Divine Guidance to accept Islam, and I am very grateful to Him with my best wishes.”

Then he told ‘Abd he would like to meet with his brother Jeefer. ‘Abd told his brother about the conversation he had with ‘Amr bin Al-’As sf. A few days later Jeefer invited ‘Amr bin AL‘As 8 to his court. He first gave him the letter of the Prophet #8. He read the letter very carefully and then answered very arrogantly:

“And what if I do not accept the invitation of your Prophet?”

‘Amr bin Al-‘As -4 replied that the answer to his question was written at the end of the letter, and requested him to read the letter again.

“He was aware that similar letters had been written to rulers of other countries as well; some of them had torn them up and consigned them to wastepaper baskets.”

‘Amr bin Al-’As . answered:

“All of them are under our control now, and soon you will see their final end.”

At first Jeefer was very furious and the conversation had to come to and end. In fact he even threatened ‘Amr bin Al-’As 4 and said that they could do their utmost and he was ready to meet their challenge. He would give them better than he got, and he would reply to the letter the following day.
content_id:
Aku berkata kepadanya: "Yang Mulia, apakah Anda mengatakan ini dengan penuh keyakinan?"

Beliau menjawab bahwa ia meyakininya dengan sepenuh hati, sebagaimana ia meyakini datangnya siang setelah matahari terbit di langit. Bahkan sebelum ini pun hatinya telah tercabut dari keyakinan lamanya. Aku menjawab:

"Yang Mulia, jika demikian halnya, maka saya ingin memeluk Islam tanpa penundaan."

Raja Najashi dengan sangat gembira mengulurkan telapak tangannya dan 'Amr bin Al-'As membaiat masuk Islam.

"Kemudian aku berangkat menuju Al-Madinah, agar aku bisa menemui Nabi ﷺ sendiri dan membaiat di tangan beliau secara langsung, serta memasuki agama Islam. Peristiwa ini terjadi sekitar enam bulan sebelum penaklukan Makkah. Di perjalanan aku bertemu dengan Khalid bin Waleed dan 'Uthman bin Talhah. Kemudian kami semua tiba di Al-Madinah bersama-sama dan menambatkan unta-unta kami di luar Masjid Nabi ﷺ. Kami mandi, berganti pakaian, karena adzan untuk salat 'Asr sudah selesai dikumandangkan. Setelah salat, kami memasuki kehadiran Nabi ﷺ. Demikianlah hidup dan nasib kami berubah dan kami memasuki agama Islam."

"Wahai 'Amr, dari kecerdasan, kebijaksanaan, pandangan jauh, dan pemahamanmu, terlintas dalam pikiranku bahwa seharusnya engkau orang pertama yang menerima Islam."

Menjawab beliau, aku berkata:

"Wahai 'Umar! Hati manusia berada dalam kendali Dzat yang telah menciptakan kita. Ketaatan dan kehormatan seperti ini diberikan ketika Dia menghendakinya; seorang makhluk fana tidak memiliki andil dalam hal ini. Sekarang setelah kehormatan ini datang kepadaku, aku merasa ini berkat keberuntunganku. Dan aku menganggap saat aku memasuki kehadiran Nabi ﷺ dan beliau menyambutku dengan wajah tersenyum, sebagai modal dan harta seluruh hidupku. Ketika aku memberi salam Islam kepadanya dengan ucapan 'Assalamu 'Alaikum', beliau menjawab dengan senyuman lembut. Aku merasa malu dan canggung, mataku tertunduk. Beliau mengambilku di bawah perlindungan kebaikannya, dan aku membaca kalimah - 'Tidak ada yang berhak disembah selain Allah dan Muhammad adalah Nabi dan Rasul-Nya.' Segera setelah membacanya, aku meminta beliau untuk memanjatkan du'a kepada Allah ﷻ untukku, agar dosa-dosaku yang lalu diampuni. Beliau menjawabku:

"Ketika engkau menerima Islam, semua dosa-dosamu yang lalu diampuni, dan dengan cara yang sama hijrah juga menghapus semua dosa-dosa sebelumnya."

Adzan, seruan untuk salat, dikumandangkan lima kali sehari untuk lima waktu salat wajib.

Aku telah menerima Islam dengan iman yang teguh dan tekad yang sangat kuat, yang diterima oleh Nabi ﷺ. Itulah alasan mengapa aku ditunjuk sebagai Panglima pasukan Muslim untuk Perang As-Salasal hanya beberapa hari kemudian. Di antara para mujahidin terdapat para sahabat terkemuka seperti Abu Bakr Siddiq, 'Umar bin Khattab, dan 'Ubaidah bin Al-Jarrah radhiyallahu 'anhum. Setelah itu aku memimpin pasukan tentara Muslim dalam banyak pertempuran yang berbahaya."

Setelah menguasai Makkah sepenuhnya, Nabi ﷺ memutuskan untuk meratakan dengan tanah berbagai kuil tempat berhala-berhala disembah di dalam dan sekitar Ka'bah. Hal ini untuk mencabut sampai ke akar-akarnya pusat-pusat di mana yang lain disejajarkan dengan Allah Yang Maha Esa. Beliau membuat pengumuman publik bahwa semua orang yang memiliki berhala di rumah mereka harus menghancurkannya dengan tangan mereka sendiri. Semua berhala di Ka'bah dihancurkan berkeping-keping, dan Baitullah yang Suci dibersihkan dari segala kotoran dan najis. Semua kuil di sekitar Makkah dihancurkan dan diratakan dengan tanah oleh para sahabat yang dipilih untuk tugas ini oleh Nabi ﷺ.

Khalid bin Waleed dikirim untuk menghancurkan berhala bernama 'Uzza, Sa'd bin Zaid Ashhali رضي الله عنه dikirim untuk meruntuhkan berhala bernama Manat. Dan

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه ditugaskan untuk menghancurkan berhala bernama Sawa'. Berhala ini telah dipasang di sebuah tempat sekitar seratus mil dari Makkah. Berhala itu dibuat atas nama Sawa', putra Syits bin Adam عليه السلام dan telah disembah sejak zaman Nuh عليه السلام. Suku Hatheel adalah penjaganya. Ketika 'Amr bin Al-'As tiba di sana, ia menemukan seorang penjaga di tempat pemujaan itu. Penjaga itu menanyakan tujuan kunjungannya. Ia menjawab bahwa ia datang ke sana untuk menghancurkan berhala itu, dan mencabut praktik jahat menyekutukan yang lain dengan Yang Maha Esa.

"Ia begitu lemah sehingga tidak bisa mempertahankan dirinya sendiri? Sungguh itu adalah kelemahan dalam pikiran kita, ini tidak mungkin tuhan kita. Ia tidak bisa menolong kita ketika kita dalam kesulitan; sungguh kita telah keliru. Engkau benar. Aku, hari ini menerima Islam dengan seluruh ketulusan hatiku. Dengan ini aku membersihkan diriku dari kotoran dan najis menyekutukan yang lain dengan Allah Yang Maha Esa dan bersujud di hadapan Allah Yang Maha Esa, yang tiada sesuatu pun dapat disekutukan dengan-Nya. Hari ini kebenaran telah terungkap bagiku, aku berharap aku tidak menghabiskan seluruh hidupku dalam rawa penyembahan berhala."

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه telah menghancurkan berhala Sawa' menjadi kepingan-kepingan tanpa hambatan apa pun.

Di tenggara Semenanjung Arabia terletak negeri 'Oman, hari ini dikenal sebagai Muscat atau 'Oman. Penduduk negeri ini menyekutukan yang lain dengan Allah Yang Maha Esa dan Nabi ﷺ mengutus 'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه untuk mengajak mereka kepada agama Islam yang benar. Dua bersaudara, 'Abd dan Jeefer memerintah negeri ini, dan mereka juga tidak menyembah Allah Yang Maha Esa, menyekutukan yang lain dengan-Nya. Nabi ﷺ juga menulis surat kepada mereka untuk meyakinkan mereka agar memeluk Islam.

Dengan Nama Allah, Yang Maha Pengasih, Maha Penyayang. Surat ini dari Muhammad bin 'Abdullah kepada 'Abd dan Jeefer. Beliau

telah mengambil tugas berdakwah, mengikuti dan menaati agar memperoleh kedamaian dan kerukunan. Terimalah Islam dan kalian akan hidup dalam kedamaian dan keamanan.

Aku telah diutus sebagai Rasul bagi seluruh alam, agar aku dapat memperingatkan manusia akan azab dan siksaan Allah ﷻ (bagi orang-orang kafir) dan menegakkan hujjah untuk meyakinkan orang-orang kafir. Jika kalian berdua menerima Islam, kalian akan terus memerintah atas tanah kalian. Jika kalian menolak, hak kalian untuk memerintah akan hilang dan akhir kalian akan menjadi pelajaran bagi yang lain.

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه membawa surat ini dan berangkat ke Yaman ('Oman) sendirian. Takdir Ilahi telah menganugerahinya kebijaksanaan dan kecerdasan. Maka ketika ia tiba di 'Oman, ia tidak menunjukkan ketergesa-gesaan, melainkan mengambil setiap langkah setelah pertimbangan, pemikiran, dan perencanaan yang matang. Karena ia dikaruniai wawasan politik, ia terlebih dahulu mempelajari karakter dan kebiasaan kedua bersaudara itu. Ia sampai pada kesimpulan bahwa adiknya, 'Abd, berhati lembut; maka ia memutuskan untuk menemuinya terlebih dahulu. Ia menyadari bahwa ia telah tepat sasaran ketika 'Abd sangat terkesan dan terpengaruh oleh ucapannya. 'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه berkata kepadanya,

"Dengan menerima Islam, engkau akan memperoleh kedua dunia. Jika engkau membaiat Islam, engkau dapat terus memerintah atas negerimu. Misi kami bukanlah untuk merebut kekuasaan dan pemerintahanmu; kami ingin membuatmu menaati perintah Allah Yang Maha Kuasa. Engkau dapat yakin bahwa jika engkau menerima Islam, engkau akan terus memerintah. Dengan demikian engkau akan berhasil baik di dunia ini maupun di akhirat."

"Apa yang engkau katakan menarik hatiku. Aku berharap saudaraku juga menyadari hal ini. Ia sangat keras kepala dan dalam hal kekuasaan untuk memerintah, ia sangat serakah. Kapan engkau masuk Islam? Kami telah melihatmu berperang melawan kaum Muslim."

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه berkata:

"Allah telah memberikan rahmat-Nya kepadaku. Jika Dia berkenan memberikan hidayah, Dia menerangi dan membuka hati untuk cahaya Islam. Allah Yang Maha Kuasa telah memberiku hidayah Ilahi untuk menerima Islam, dan aku sangat bersyukur kepada-Nya dengan segala harapan terbaikku."

Kemudian ia memberitahu 'Abd bahwa ia ingin bertemu dengan saudaranya Jeefer. 'Abd memberitahu saudaranya tentang percakapan yang ia lakukan dengan 'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه. Beberapa hari kemudian Jeefer mengundang 'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه ke istananya. Ia pertama-tama memberikan surat Nabi ﷺ kepadanya. Ia membaca surat itu dengan sangat seksama kemudian menjawab dengan sangat sombong:

"Dan bagaimana jika aku tidak menerima undangan Nabimu?"

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه menjawab bahwa jawaban atas pertanyaannya tertulis di akhir surat, dan memintanya untuk membaca surat itu lagi.

"Ia menyadari bahwa surat serupa telah ditulis kepada penguasa negara-negara lain juga; beberapa dari mereka telah merobeknya dan membuangnya ke tempat sampah."

'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه menjawab:

"Mereka semua sekarang berada di bawah kendali kami, dan segera engkau akan melihat akhir mereka."

Pada awalnya Jeefer sangat murka dan percakapan harus dihentikan. Bahkan ia mengancam 'Amr bin Al-'As رضي الله عنه dan mengatakan bahwa mereka bisa melakukan apa pun yang mereka mampu dan ia siap menghadapi tantangan mereka. Ia akan membalas lebih dari yang ia terima, dan ia akan membalas surat itu keesokan harinya.
content_ar: I told him: “Your Royal Highness, are you saying this believing in fully?” أجاب that he believed in it wholeheartedly, just as he believed in the day بعد the sun rose up in the heavens. Even from قبل this his القلب had been uprooted from his old الإيمان. I replied: “Your Majesty, إذا this is لذا, then I would like to become a مسلم without any delay.” King Najashi very happily put out his palm and ‘Amr bin Al-‘As pledge allegiance to الإسلام. “Then I left for Al-المدينة المنورة, لذا I could meet النبي ﷺ 3 himself and swear allegiance on his palm personally, and enter the fold of الإسلام. This incident occurred about six months قبل the الفتح of مكة المكرمة. On the الطريق I met Khalid bin Waleed and ‘عثمان bin Talhah. Then all of us reached AlMadinah together and tethered our camels outside the المسجد of النبي ﷺ 3%. We bathed, changed clothes, بما أن the Adhan'! for the ‘Asr الصلوات had already been over. بعد الصلاة we entered the presence of النبي ﷺ 3%. وهكذا our lives and fortunes changed and we entered the fold of الإسلام.” “Amr from your intelligence, الحكمة, foresight and الفهم, it strikes me that you should have been the أولاً to accept الإسلام.” Answering him, [ said: “O ‘عمر! Men’s القلوب are in the control of that being who has created us. This kind of obedience and honour are given عندما He desires it; a mortal has no part in this. Now that this honour has come to me I feel it is بسبب my الخير fortune. And I consider that time عندما I entered the presence of النبي ﷺ 3% and he received me with smiling face, to be the fund and capital of my whole الحياة. عندما I wished him with the Islamic greeting of ‘Asslamo ‘Alikum’, أجاب with smiling gently. I was ashamed and embarrassed, my eyes were cast down. He took me under the protection of his benevolence, and I read the Kalimah - ‘None has the الحق to be worshipped but الله and محمد ﷺ is His النبي and Messenger.’ Immediately بعد reading it, | asked him to offer supplications to الله 38 for me, لذا that my previous الذنوب are forgiven. رد me: “عندما you accept الإسلام all your previous الذنوب are forgiven, and in the same الطريق Hijrah (migration) أيضاً erases all previous الذنوب.” ' The call to الصلوات, given five times a day for the five compulsory الصلوات, 1 had accepted الإسلام with a firm الإيمان and a very strong determination, which was accepted by النبي ﷺ #8. That was the العقل why I was appointed القائد of the مسلم الجيش for the المعركة of As-Salasal just a few days later. Among the المجاهدين were such notable الصحابة as أبو بكر Siddiq, ‘عمر bin Khattéb and ‘Ubaidah bin Al-Jarrah we) rs. بعد that I command the forces of the مسلم الجيش in many dangerous encounters.” بعد gaining complete control of مكة المكرمة, النبي ﷺ 38 decided to raze down to the earth the various temples where idols were worshipped in and around the Ka’bah. This was to completely uproot the centres where others were being equated with the One True الله Almighty. He made a public announcement that all those who had idols in their houses should break them with their own hands. All the idols in the Ka‘bah were shattered into pieces, and the Sacred House of الله was cleansed of all impurity and filth. All the temples in the environs of مكة المكرمة were destroyed and razed to the ground by الصحابة who were chosen for this task by النبي ﷺ 38. Khalid bin Waleed was sent to destroy an idol called ‘Uzza, Sa’d bin Zaid Ashhali < was sent to demolish an idol called Manat. And ‘Amr bin Al-‘As 4 was to destroy an idol by the name of Sawa’. This idol had been installed at a place about hundred miles from مكة المكرمة. It had been made in the name of Sawa’, the son of Sheeth bin آدم 42) and it was being worshipped from the time of Nah pW. The tribe of Hatheel was its trustees. عندما ‘Amr bin Al-’As reached there, he found an attendant at the shrine. He asked him for the purpose of his visit. رد he had come there to destroy the idol, and uproot this الشر practice of associating others with the One “He is لذا weak that he cannot even defend himself? Surely it is a الضعف in our minds, this cannot possibly be our god. He cannot help us عندما we are in trouble; surely we are mistaken. You are الحق. I, today accept الإسلام with all the sincerity of my القلب. I herewith cleanse myself from the filth and impurity of associating others with the One True الله and prostrate قبل the One True الله, with Whom none can be associated. Today reality has been revealed to me, I wish I had not spent my whole الحياة in the swamp of idol worship.” “Amr bin Al-As 4 had broken the idol Sawa’ into fragments without any hindrance. On the south east of the peninsula of Arabia lies the state of ‘Oman, today it is known as Muscat or ‘Oman, The people of this land associated others with the One True الله and النبي ﷺ sent ‘Amr bin AL’As . to invite them to the true religion of الإسلام. Two brothers, ‘Abd and Jeefer ruled over this country, and they أيضاً did not worship One True الله, associating others with him. النبي ﷺ 3 أيضاً wrote letter to them to convince them to convert to الإسلام. In the Name of الله, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful This letter is from محمد ﷺ bin ‘Abdullah to ‘Abd and Jeefer. He has taken the task of preaching, of following and obeying لذا that he may gain peace and concord. Accept الإسلام and you will live in peace and safety. I have been sent as a Messenger for all the worlds, لذا that I may warn people of the torments and tortures of الله 3% (for disbelievers) and adduce arguments to convince the Kuffar. إذا both you brothers accept الإسلام, you will continue to rule over your fand. إذا you refuse your الحق to govern will be lost and your end will be a lesson for others. ‘Amr bin Al-’As dé took this letter and left for Yemen (‘Oman) alone. Divine providence had bestowed him with الحكمة and intelligence. لذا عندما he reached ‘Oman he did not display any haste, but took every step بعد a great deal of thought, consideration and planning. As he was gifted with political insight, he أولاً studied the الأخلاق and habits of the two brothers. He reached the conclusion that the younger الأخ ‘Abd was soft hearted; لذا he decided to meet him أولاً. He realised he had hit the target عندما ‘Abd was deeply impressed and influenced by his speech. ‘Amr bin Al-’As 4 told him, “By accepting الإسلام you will gain both worlds. إذا you pledge allegiance to الإسلام you can continue to rule over your country, Our mission is not to grab your power and rule; we wish to make you obey the orders of الله Almighty. You can rest assured that إذا you accept الإسلام you will continue to rule. وهكذا you will be successful both in this الدنيا and in الآخرة.” “What you say appeals to me. I wish my الأخ أيضاً would realise this. He is very stubborn and in the matter of the power to rule, he is extremely greedy. عندما did you become a مسلم? We have seen you fighting against the المسلمون.” ‘Amr bin Al-’As 2% said: “الله has been Gracious to me. إذا He pleases to give الهداية He makes manifest and clear the القلب to the radiance of الإسلام. الله Almighty has given me Divine الهداية to accept الإسلام, and I am very grateful to Him with my best wishes.” Then he told ‘Abd he would like to meet with his الأخ Jeefer. ‘Abd told his الأخ about the conversation he had with ‘Amr bin Al-’As sf. A few days later Jeefer invited ‘Amr bin AL‘As 8 to his court. He أولاً gave him the letter of النبي ﷺ #8. He read the letter very carefully and then answered very arrogantly: “And what إذا I do not accept the invitation of your النبي?” ‘Amr bin Al-‘As -4 replied that the answer to his question was written at the end of the letter, and requested him to read the letter again. “He was aware that similar letters had been written to rulers of other countries as well; some of them had torn them up and consigned them to wastepaper baskets.” ‘Amr bin Al-’As . answered: “All of them are under our control now, and soon you will see their final end.” At أولاً Jeefer was very furious and the conversation had to come to and end. In fact he even threatened ‘Amr bin Al-’As 4 and said that they could do their utmost and he was ready to meet their challenge. He would give them better than he got, and he would reply to the letter the following day.
